title: rosa caryophyllacea subvar. zagrabiensis
intro: Rosa caryophyllacea subvar. zagrabiensis, also known as Zagreb rose, is a lesser-known subspecies of the fragrant rose (Rosa caryophyllacea). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa caryophyllacea subvar. zagrabiensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used to make fragrances and perfumes.
